arts.ttl: Arsenal BOMBSHELL: Gunners 'close' to Nico Williams agreement
arts.sum: The 22-year-old is widely expected to secure a move this summer and FootballTransfers understands that he is a key target for Mikel Arteta’s side as the Gunners look to bolster their forward line. Arsenal are “close” to reaching a full agreement with Athletic Club winger Nico Williams, according to a bombshell report in Spain.

arts.ttl: 'Sad' Celtic exit, new striker outlined and every word on Kieran Tierney return – full Brendan Rodgers transfer update
arts.sum: It's all happening at Celtic Park in what is set to be a busy final few days of the January window

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers CONFIRMS Arsenal star Kieran Tierney will join Celtic this summer - but still hopes to bring him back to the Scottish giants this month
arts.sum: With loanee Alex Valle back at parent club Barcelona , Rodgers would like the left back to return north of the border before next week's transfer deadline to bolster his defence.

arts.ttl: Team News: Girona vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Girona and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Rodgers confirms pre-contract deal for Tierney ... but admits he wants to bring Arsenal star back on loan before transfer window shuts
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has admitted that Celtic hope to wrap up a deal to sign Kieran Tierney from Arsenal before the window shuts.

arts.ttl: Jhon Duran signs, Matheus Cunha deal, Evan Ferguson option - Next Arsenal transfer decided - Kieran King - football.london
arts.sum: Benjamin Sesko and Alexander Isak are long-term targets and now Jhon Duran and Evan Ferguson have become of interest this month. Arsenal have needed a striker for the last few seasons in all honesty, and while a panic buy in the final days of the January transfer window is not exactly the best solution, Arteta clearly needs attacking reinforcements.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers hoping Arsenal’s Kieran Tierney will rejoin Celtic in days
arts.sum: Deal done for left-back to go back to Scotland in summer But Rodgers keen for move to be in this transfer window Brendan Rodgers has confirmed for the first time that Celtic have agreed a deal to re-sign Kieran Tierney from Arsenal. With a free transfer in place for the summer, Celtic hope to be able to bring Tierney back to Glasgow before this transfer window closes. Celtic sold Tierney to Arsenal in 2019 for £25m, the left-back having come through the youth ranks at the Scottish champions. Speculation never really disappeared that Tierney would return to Celtic; those stories intensified after it became clear Arsenal would not take up the option to extend Tierney’s contract at the end of this campaign. arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta calls for major football change to remove 'hatred' after Michael Oliver abuse
arts.sum: Arsenal boss believes abuse aimed at players, coaches and referee is not being dealt with ‘strongly enough’

arts.ttl: Arsenal outcast Tierney set for Celtic reunion as transfer agreed
arts.sum: Arsenal left-back Kieran Tierney has agreed a move to Celtic in the summer transfer window, manager Brendan Rodgers has confirmed. The 27-year-old left the Scottish outfit to join the Gunners in 2019 for a reported £25 million fee, but has been beset by injuries in recent years. Tierney has fallen out of favour with Arsenal […] The post Arsenal outcast Tierney set for Celtic reunion as transfer agreed first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Every word from Mikel Arteta's pre-Girona presser
arts.sum: They’re a really good side, if you look at the games they’ve played in the Champions League against top opposition, they’ve made life very difficult for them. Every time I talk about this topic, regardless of whether it’s about a player, a coach or a referee it doesn’t matter - we really have to work harder to eradicate this part of the game that brings nothing but bad stuff, leaves a bad taste and makes people’s lives more difficult.
